name: Kawata Mfg. Co., Ltd.
summary: Kawata Mfg. Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, designs and manufactures powder and grain processing equipment and systems in Japan and internationally. The company provides dehydrating, nitrogen, hot air, reduced pressure, and large PET resin crystal dryer; blenders, such as weighing, volumetric metering, and simple blending type; and loaders, which consists pellet transport, powder transport, and plug transport. It also offers heating medium circulation temperature controllers, which consists water medium temperature controller, water medium cold temperature controller, oil medium temperature controller, chillers, mode rapid cooling, and others; mixers, including high speed fluid mixing, high efficiency dry dispersion, cool mixing, and high speed floating mixing. In addition, the company provides granulator; silo tank, which comprises H series and flexible containment tank; dosage supply machine, nitrogen replacement machine, fine powder removal, pellet sorting, nitrogen gas generation, magnet, and filter washer; system/plant equipment; powder processing machines and system; and equipment for battery, ceramic, fine chemical, food, cosmetics, drug, and paint industry. The company was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
